metadata.summary: Python API to access doxygen generated XML output

documentation:
Doxmlparser
===========

This is a python package to make it easier to parse the XML output produced by doxygen.

The API is generated from the index.xsd and compound.xsd XML schema files using
Dave Kuhlman's generateDS https://www.davekuhlman.org/generateDS.html

The current code is generated with generateDS version 2.37.15.

See the examples directory to get an idea how to use the python module

functions.name: doxmlparser.index.getSubclassFromModule_
documentation: Get the subclass of a class from a specific module.

functions.name: doxmlparser.index.get_required_ns_prefix_defs
documentation:
Get all name space prefix definitions required in this XML doc.
Return a dictionary of definitions and a char string of definitions.

functions.name: doxmlparser.index.parseString
documentation:
Parse a string, create the object tree, and export it.

Arguments:
- inString -- A string.  This XML fragment should not start
  with an XML declaration containing an encoding.
- silence -- A boolean.  If False, export the object.
Returns -- The root object in the tree.

functions.name: doxmlparser.compound.getSubclassFromModule_
documentation: Get the subclass of a class from a specific module.

functions.name: doxmlparser.compound.get_required_ns_prefix_defs
documentation:
Get all name space prefix definitions required in this XML doc.
Return a dictionary of definitions and a char string of definitions.

functions.name: doxmlparser.compound.parseString
documentation:
Parse a string, create the object tree, and export it.

Arguments:
- inString -- A string.  This XML fragment should not start
  with an XML declaration containing an encoding.
- silence -- A boolean.  If False, export the object.
Returns -- The root object in the tree.

classes.name: doxmlparser.compound.docImageFileType
documentation:
The mentioned file will be located in the directory as specified by
XML_OUTPUT
